# Runtime Safety Plan

This planning note records future runtime safety concepts only. It is not an executable workflow.

## Future Concepts

- Certified execution boundary review
- Fail-closed runtime review
- Runtime containment review
- Execution quarantine review
- Runtime safety evidence review
- Runtime shutdown condition review
- Runtime escalation blocking review
- Execution safety certification review

## Boundaries

This plan does not create workflows, deployment automation, provider integrations, runtime communication, credentials, branch protection settings, route rewrites, route deletion, provider adapters, or automatic approvals.
